summary: Single counter-trend crash-long entry with capitulation filter — no leakage, low integrity risk, advisory caution on live conflict and concentration.

risk_assessments.leakage_notes: All three novel_dim fields are T0-observable: global_long_ratio is a snapshot ratio at signal time, move_pct<=-4 is the triggering crash magnitude (not forward-looking), and taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55 references the trailing 5m window ending at T0 (standard rolling aggregate, not post-event). No forward_*, confirm_after_*, or post_event_* fields present.
risk_assessments.live_conflict_notes: User runs 'BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump long' live; this is pricechange-channel CRASH-long (counter-trend bounce), so symbol overlap is possible but directional thesis differs (capitulation reversal vs. pump continuation). Concurrent same-symbol longs from different triggers could double exposure rather than conflict, but is an advisory monitoring item, not an integrity issue.
risk_assessments.remediation: None required for integrity. Advisory: in paper-shadow tracking, log per-symbol concurrency vs. the live pump-long strategy and flag any window where both fire on the same symbol within 5m; ensure taker_buy_ratio_5m is computed strictly on [T0-5m, T0] candles with no T0+ inclusion.
